# AFOI DELI — Knowledge & Operating Vault

Private Obsidian vault and operating system for **Afoi Deli Floor + Bath** (Athens) **and Orfeas Delis as a person** — business and personal are one fabric by design. Knowledge layer for operations, suppliers, products, projects, automation, and the future Afoi Deli OS.

> **Private repository.** Contains supplier, client, and financial knowledge. Do not make public.

<!-- REPO-ANALYSIS:BEGIN — generated by /repo-analysis · do not edit inside these markers -->
## The vision, in brief *(generated 2026-07-02 · full text: [docs/VISION.md](docs/VISION.md))*

**Vision.** A second-generation Athens family merchant of premium architectural surfaces and bath, giving itself — and its successor — a second brain that compounds. The stated north star (`01_COMPANY_CORE/Afoi Deli Master Profile.md`): become the most intelligent, design-aware, operationally precise architectural-material distributor in Greece, then turn that intelligence into a platform, a content engine, and potentially a new category of construction/material operating system. Two convictions shape everything: **the moat is the uplift engine, not the brand portfolio**, and **business and personal are one fabric**.

**The workflow.** Three engines and one ritual. *Revenue:* the sample-wall selection craft feeds the order spine (statuses 0–4, ΚΟΥΒΑΣ procurement pool, proforma and payment gates) through ELXIS consolidation logistics to delivery and collection. *Knowledge:* two-strata supplier dossiers (public research + privately enriched truth), a three-tier materials layer (class → collection → SKU), and a standing ingest/query/lint loop. *Governance:* a session ritual that boots from `The Heart.md`, closes by regenerating this analysis suite, and commits everything — with hard human-approval gates on anything external or financial. Obsidian is the memory; the agent is never the source of truth.

**What's novel.** An LLM-Wiki with an **authorship line** — Claude maintains the reference layer, the soul (doctrine, journal, decisions) stays human-authored · **instance-first over schema-first** — the tracer walks one real order end-to-end before any automation runs · the **drudgery/craft line** — mechanical work gets automated, the selling gift deliberately never · **confidence-graded facts** (`verified | likely | memory_seed | needs_check`) mapped into the future database · a visible **enrichment contract** for private knowledge gaps · **status-honest artifacts** — the unbuilt OS renders as unlit space · a **self-describing repo** whose push guard blocks any commit-set that changes notes without refreshed analysis · an **audit immune system** with a persistent findings ledger.

**End goal.** The Afoi Deli OS — a five-layer control tower: Knowledge (Obsidian) → Data (Supabase Postgres) → Automation (Python worker) → Interface (the operations cockpit) → AI Agent (Hermes), where every order, supplier, loading, proforma, invoice, delivery, and client promise is visible and actionable. Honest state today: **Layer 1 runs; the 11 data contracts hold zero rows.** The proven intelligence turns outward (an architect-facing material platform) only after internal proof.

**Roadmap.** (1) Finish the tracer — batches E–G of one real order · (2) reconcile the specification to reality — schema corrections, MEGASOFT + rebates into the data contracts · (3) first real rows — the ΚΟΥΒΑΣ migration, read-only first · (4) the Python worker's five jobs, every external send behind approval · (5) the cockpit mockup becomes the working interface; client-facing surfaces last · (6) in parallel, the knowledge flywheel — dossiers to Kronos depth, the material classes, collections on ingestion · (7) growth axes staged behind the spine: Scavolini kitchens, outdoor, stock e-shop, hospitality, platform, personal brand.

## Where to start
- **In Obsidian:** `The Heart.md` (doctrine root — read first) → `14_AI_COLLABORATION/Collaboration Home.md` (working hub). Canonical folder index: `99_SYSTEM/Vault Map.md`.
- **For Claude / AI sessions:** `CLAUDE.md` (root) defines operating instructions; memory lives in `14_AI_COLLABORATION/Vault State Memory.md`.
- `README_START_HERE.md` is a pre-pivot historical artifact — do not treat it as current doctrine.

## Sync workflow
```bash
git add -A
git commit -m "<type>: <summary>"   # feat | fix | docs | chore | refactor
git push
```
Full routine and session memory protocol: `14_AI_COLLABORATION/Session Protocol.md`. The end-of-session ritual (`CLAUDE.md` §8) refreshes `docs/REPO_ANALYSIS.md` before the commit; a push guard enforces it.

On a **fresh clone**, activate the repo's git hooks once:
```bash
git config core.hooksPath .githooks
```

## Plugins
Dataview, Templater, Obsidian Git — see `14_AI_COLLABORATION/Obsidian Plugin Setup.md`.

## Principle
Obsidian is the memory. Structured files/data are the source of truth — never the AI. Humans approve all external/risky actions.
